synthesis: Mobius closed the cycle in green posture with GI at 0.82. The ledger registered 4 events over the last 24 hours, all ZEUS verification, while institutional remained the strongest visible domain signal at 0.866. ZEUS verification status is inconclusive, the latest heartbeat trend is rising, and the micro lane still carries 12 stressed instruments under a stale C-306 cycle tag. Forward signal: watch infrastructure and quorum registration for confirmation or drift in the next cycle.
